title: dianthus ancyrensis
intro: Dianthus ancyrensis, also known as the Pyrenean pink or Pyrenean catchfly, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and soothing respiratory issues, and is often used in herbal preparations to treat coughs and colds. Dianthus ancyrensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in essential oil form to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
